scripts.format: prettier --write .golangci.yml .prettierrc package.json package-lock.json docker-compose.yml README.md AGENTS.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/architecture.md sync/sync.js sync/package.json sync/package-lock.json sync/eslint.config.js && npm run format:go
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .golangci.yml .prettierrc package.json package-lock.json docker-compose.yml README.md AGENTS.md CONTRIBUTING.md docs/architecture.md sync/sync.js sync/package.json sync/package-lock.json sync/eslint.config.js
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run format:go:check && npm run test:go && npm run lint:go && npm --prefix sync run check:code
